examples.title: Solar Panel Output Calculation
examples.description: Calculate daily energy output from solar panels based on panel specifications and location
examples.explanation: This algorithm calculates the actual energy output of a solar panel system by considering panel efficiency, available sunlight hours, and system losses. It demonstrates the practical considerations in solar energy estimation.

examples.title: Solar Panel Optimal Angle Calculator
examples.description: Calculate optimal tilt angle for solar panels based on latitude
examples.explanation: This algorithm calculates optimal tilt angles for solar panels throughout the year. The angle affects how directly sunlight strikes the panel surface, maximizing energy capture.

examples.title: Solar Battery Charging State Management
examples.description: Manage battery charging states in a solar PV system with battery backup
examples.code:
ALGORITHM BatteryManagement
BEGIN
 INPUT batteryCapacity // Battery capacity in Ah
 INPUT currentSOC // Current State of Charge (0-100%)
 INPUT solarInput // Current solar power input (Watts)
 INPUT loadPower // Current load demand (Watts)
 INPUT batteryVoltage // Battery system voltage

 availablePower = solarInput - loadPower

 IF availablePower > 0 THEN
 // Excess power available - charge battery
 chargeCurrent = availablePower / batteryVoltage
 maxChargeCurrent = batteryCapacity * 0.2 // 20% C-rate

 IF chargeCurrent > maxChargeCurrent THEN
 chargeCurrent = maxChargeCurrent
 ENDIF

 newSOC = currentSOC + (chargeCurrent * 100 / batteryCapacity)
 newSOC = MIN(newSOC, 100) // Cap at 100%
 ELSE
 // Deficit - discharge battery dischargeCurrent = -availablePower / batteryVoltage
 maxDischargeCurrent = batteryCapacity * 0.5 // 50% C-rate safe discharge

 IF dischargeCurrent > maxDischargeCurrent THEN // Draw max safe current, grid supplements rest dischargeCurrent = maxDischargeCurrent ENDIF

 newSOC = currentSOC - (dischargeCurrent * 100 / batteryCapacity) newSOC = MAX(newSOC, 20) // Keep 20% minimum SOC
 ENDIF

 OUTPUT newSOC
 OUTPUT chargeCurrent (if charging) OUTPUT dischargeCurrent (if discharging)
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm manages battery charging and discharging in a solar system, ensuring safe charging rates and preventing deep discharge that can damage batteries.
